row_decision_policy.TRK-W64-114: card schema, immutable source hash, rights, tests, and registry evidence required
row_decision_policy.TRK-W64-115: decoded source, exact segment bounds, transcript, quality, contamination, and preserved-byte evidence required
row_decision_policy.TRK-W64-116: explainable rights-valid casting plus runtime continuity and explicit authority state required
row_decision_policy.TRK-W64-117: immutable provider revision, exact files, license, isolated environment, loader proof, and queued QA required
